title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Franky, Nami, Tontatta, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as dressrosa’s toys and forgotten people reveal that Doflamingo’s rule has erased lives, memories, and families from the country.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Haa... HAA... why isn't nami-ya picking up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm sure I've got the right number!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If I don't restrain it, this cabinet's gonna fall.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You all ready to go Leo? Don't forget your lunch box.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Granny, there's food already prepared at HQ.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah, of course! I'll just stitch everything that looks like it might fall.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Even though you can do that, that hero sure is some- thing, isn't he.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: That's right! Because he's the legendary hero, usoland!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And I thought I'd fall over, but now I won't.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That is to say, I've fortified myself for Battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You beheld it earlier, when, trem- bling with excitement...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I caused the very earth to shake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Uohhh his power is immeasur- able!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: By the way, Leo, you were going on about how this is a decisive battle, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WH... Why exactly are you going up against Dofla- Mingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The hero is a skilled jokester as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's because we're going to save 500 of our people.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: who are being forced to work in the "Dark Factory," of course!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The one Luffy went to destroy...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This factory... is it the smile factory...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We don't know what they're making, but...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: In that factory is the Tontatta Tribe's...

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
